name: claude-sessions
description: Desktop app for managing Claude Code sessions

scripts.start: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run dev
scripts.clean: bun run kill-app; bun run kill-server; true
scripts.kill-app: pkill -f 'Claudex' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'Claude Sessions' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'electrobun dev' 2>/dev/null; true
